_comment: k6 summary baseline for POST /transactions/record under the sustained scenario. Generated by running the perf-regression workflow on-demand against the docker-compose.test.yml fixture and copying the `scenarios.sustained` slice of the k6 JSON summary. Refresh intentionally when performance improves — this is the floor, not a moving target.
_stale_after_comment: compare-baseline.mjs refuses to skip the comparison once the current date is past this ISO timestamp — prevents the baseline from silently accepting zeros forever. Update deliberately when refreshing the baseline.
_refresh_instructions: pnpm exec k6 run --summary-export=perf/last-run.json scripts/load-test/escrow-create.js -e BASE_URL=http://localhost:3011 -e JWT=<token> -e TRADE_ID=1 -e ESCROW_ID=1 -e NETWORK_NAME=solana-devnet. Then: node scripts/load-test/refresh-baseline.mjs perf/last-run.json perf/baseline.json.
